description: Testing visual appearance and behavior of links including hover states and positioning

expected_result:
Display like text links, the same as required on spec
(color, bold, italic, font size, can hover, mouse icon ...)

description: Testing link functionality including URL redirections, download operations, and cross-browser compatibility

test_view_points.viewpoint: Confirm the link after click on the links

Confirm the redirection time to the link
(for internal links)
expected_result:
Redirect immediately with the time loading about < 1000ms(10s)
(Or the same as required on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Confirm the redirection time to the link
(for external links)
Confirm the link after click on the links
Confirm the link after click on the links

Confirm the new tab or new windows have opened when click to the link
(On Chrome, Firefox, IE, Safari)
expected_result:
The new tab will be opened
(Or the same as required on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Confirm the broken links
(Use Chrome extention with "Check My Links")
expected_result: Do not have any broken links

description: Testing link behavior under concurrent access and multiple click scenarios

test_view_points.viewpoint: Confirm the operation of the link when multiple click to the link at the same time
expected_result: The multiple new tab will be opened

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Confirm the operation of the link when multiple people access at the same time
(Use tool "LoadImpact (Free)")
expected_result: The links do not broken & Redirect immediately
